## Basic Information
replace me - with a longer description of the data product

### Naming Convention
$MWM_RGB/apogee_rgb_nlte_abundances/payne4GAIN_summary-[V_VAC].fits where V_VAC=1.1.1 for DR20

### Releases
DR20

### Enviroments
MWM_RGB

### Approximate Size
213 MB

### File Type
FITS

### Generated by Product
replace me - with the name(s) of any git or svn product(s) that produces this product.

### Is a VAC
True

### Data Level
3.3.0
